title: Manuscript v2 Quantitative Integrity Audit: Cross-Reference All Claims Against Source Data
summary: Demo notebook for the Manuscript v2 Quantitative Integrity Audit. Extracts 25 quantitative claims from sample LaTeX text using 19 regex patterns, then runs 5 verification checks: stale number detection (finds 4 iter_3 values needing update), CI anomaly detection (catches 33.2% outside [22.4%, 26.2%]), arithmetic error checking (F1 != harmonic mean of P,R), internal consistency (4 conflicting values across sections), and cross-reference verification (9 claims verified against source experiment data). Visualizes audit results with error category bar chart, stale vs corrected value comparison, and claim type distribution pie chart. Uses mini_demo_data.json containing sample LaTeX, source registry, and pre-computed full audit results for comparison.
